title: position-sizer output
description: Canonical structured output for the position-sizer skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered side-by-side table) is described in the SKILL.md render section.

as_of.description: Local 'as-of' date the run was anchored to.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp when the script ran.

tickers_used.description: Tickers that survived the history filter and were sized. Sorted alphabetically.

tickers_excluded.description: Tickers dropped from the book and why.

lookback_days.description: Trading days of daily returns pulled.

n_obs_aligned.description: Trading days remaining after intersecting all return series.

target_vol.description: Annualized portfolio vol target used by the vol-target method. Decimal.

leverage_cap.description: Max gross exposure (Σ|w|) enforced on every method.

max_weight.description: Per-name weight cap (decimal), or null for no cap.

kelly_scale.description: Fractional Kelly scale used by the kelly method.

methods_emitted.description: Methods whose output actually landed in 'sizings'. May exclude kelly if edges were not supplied.

name_stats.description: Per-ticker realized stats over the aligned panel.

vol_annualized.description: Sample std of daily log returns annualized at sqrt(252). Decimal.

n_obs.description: Trading days in the aligned series.

mean_return_annualized.description: Mean daily log return * 252. Display-only; NOT used as a Kelly edge.

tickers.description: Order matches rows/cols of raw + shrunk.

sizings.description: One key per emitted method: vol_target, kelly_quarter, risk_parity, equal_weight.

weights.description: Position weight per ticker (decimal of book).

binding_constraint.description: Which constraint actually bound the final result, or null if none did.

edges_used.description: Per-ticker edges consumed by Kelly. Decimal annualized.

negative_signals_floored.description: True if any Kelly raw weight was negative and floored at 0 (long-only v1).

iterations.description: Iterations the ERC solver consumed (risk_parity only).

converged.description: Whether ERC converged within tol (risk_parity only).

marginal_risk_contributions.description: Per-ticker share of total portfolio variance (risk_parity only). Should equal 1/N at convergence.

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats: excluded tickers, missing Kelly edges, convergence fallback, the always-on vol/shrinkage caveats.

sources.description: All Massive endpoints called during the run, with fetched-at timestamps for audit.
